spec.expr:
options(global_filter=( _stream:{panos.device_name in(${firewall:doublequote}),panos.vsys in(${vsys:doublequote}),panos.type=${type:doublequote},panos.subtype in(${subtype:doublequote}),network.direction=${direction:doublequote}} panos.action:in(${action:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw} ))
source.ip:in(
    * | stats by (source.ip) sum(network.bytes) results | sort by (results) desc | limit 10 | keep source.ip
)
| stats by (source.ip) sum(network.bytes) results

options(global_filter=( _stream:{panos.device_name in(${firewall:doublequote}),panos.vsys in(${vsys:doublequote}),panos.type=${type:doublequote},panos.subtype in(${subtype:doublequote}),network.direction=${direction:doublequote}} panos.action:in(${action:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw} ))
destination.ip:in(
    * | stats by (destination.ip) sum(network.bytes) results | sort by (results) desc | limit 10 | keep destination.ip
)
| stats by (destination.ip) sum(network.bytes) results

options(global_filter=( _stream:{panos.device_name in(${firewall:doublequote}),panos.vsys in(${vsys:doublequote}),panos.type=${type:doublequote},panos.subtype in(${subtype:doublequote}),network.direction=${direction:doublequote}} panos.action:in(${action:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw} ))
network.transport_port:in(
    * | top 10 (network.transport_port) | keep network.transport_port
)
| stats by (network.transport_port) count() results

options(global_filter=( _stream:{panos.device_name in(${firewall:doublequote}),panos.vsys in(${vsys:doublequote}),panos.type=${type:doublequote},panos.subtype in(${subtype:doublequote}),network.direction=${direction:doublequote}} panos.action:in(${action:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw} ))
network.application:in(

)
| stats by (network.application) count() results

options(global_filter=( _stream:{panos.device_name in(${firewall:doublequote}),panos.vsys in(${vsys:doublequote}),panos.type=${type:doublequote},panos.subtype in(${subtype:doublequote}),network.direction=${direction:doublequote}} panos.action:in(${action:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw} panos.container_of_app:*))
panos.container_of_app:in(
    * | top 10 (panos.container_of_app) | keep panos.container_of_app
)
| stats by (panos.container_of_app) count() results

options(global_filter=( _stream:{panos.device_name in(${firewall:doublequote}),panos.vsys in(${vsys:doublequote}),panos.type=${type:doublequote},panos.subtype in(${subtype:doublequote}),network.direction=${direction:doublequote}} panos.action:in(${action:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw} panos.category_of_app:*))
panos.category_of_app:in(
    * | top 10 (panos.category_of_app) | keep panos.category_of_app
)
| stats by (panos.category_of_app) count() results

options(global_filter=( _stream:{panos.device_name in(${firewall:doublequote}),panos.vsys in(${vsys:doublequote}),panos.type=${type:doublequote},panos.subtype in(${subtype:doublequote}),network.direction=${direction:doublequote}} panos.action:in(${action:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw} panos.subcategory_of_app:*))
panos.subcategory_of_app:in(
    * | top 10 (panos.subcategory_of_app) | keep panos.subcategory_of_app
)
| stats by (panos.subcategory_of_app) count() results

_stream:{panos.device_name in(${firewall:doublequote}),panos.vsys in(${vsys:doublequote}),panos.type=${type:doublequote},panos.subtype in(${subtype:doublequote}),network.direction=${direction:doublequote}}
| panos.action:in(${action:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw}
| panos.characteristic_of_app:*
| unroll (panos.characteristic_of_app)
| stats by (panos.characteristic_of_app,panos.action) count() results 
| sort by (results) desc 
| limit 10

    * | stats by (panos.container_of_app) sum(network.bytes) results | sort by (results) desc | limit 10 | keep panos.container_of_app
)
| stats by (panos.container_of_app) sum(network.bytes) results

spec.description:
Custom LogsQL filter attached to every query.
Set to "*" to not filter.
See https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victorialogs/logsql/
spec.name: Logsql
